description: Write failing contract tests for the optimizer bridge surface.
steps: Create tests/test_optimizer_bridge.py with import and contract expectations.
Cover optimizer bridge entrypoints and mutation trial payload shape.
Assert no live optimizer dependency is required for import.
verification: pytest tests/test_optimizer_bridge.py -q fails because the bridge modules do not exist yet.

description: Run the optimizer bridge contract tests red and capture the expected failure mode.
steps: Run the focused optimizer bridge test file.
Confirm failure is due to missing bridge modules or symbols.
Do not implement code until the red state is observed.
verification: Pytest output shows missing optimizer bridge modules or missing symbols.

description: Create minimal optimizer bridge scaffolding.
steps: Add dharma_swarm/optimizer_bridge.py.
Add dharma_swarm/optimizers/__init__.py.
Export the narrow public types required by the tests.
verification: Focused optimizer bridge contract tests import successfully.

description: Verify the core optimizer bridge scaffold tests green.
steps: Run pytest tests/test_optimizer_bridge.py -q.
Confirm only the implemented contract expectations pass.
Keep the bridge surface minimal.
verification: Focused optimizer bridge scaffold tests pass.

description: Write failing tests for runtime-field manifest to optimizer candidate projection.
steps: Assert runtime field manifests are converted to stable candidate objects.
Cover numeric, categorical, and prompt-like fields.
Assert candidate metadata preserves field names and rollback context.
verification: Projection tests fail because candidate conversion logic is missing.

description: Run projection tests red for runtime-field candidate conversion.
steps: Execute the focused projection tests.
Confirm failure is due to missing conversion behavior rather than bad assertions.
Record the candidate fields that need support first.
verification: Pytest shows missing projection implementation.

description: Implement runtime-field manifest to optimizer candidate projection.
steps: Convert manifest rows into candidate objects with value type metadata.
Preserve field name, path, and current value.
Avoid mutating runtime fields during projection.
verification: Projection tests pass for supported field types.

description: Verify runtime-field candidate projection tests green.
steps: Run the projection-focused test subset.
Ensure candidate projection remains pure and deterministic.
Leave unsupported field types guarded, not silently coerced.
verification: Projection-focused pytest subset passes.

description: Write failing tests for applying and rolling back runtime-field mutations.
steps: Cover mutation application through RuntimeFieldRegistry.
Cover rollback through reset semantics.
Assert failed trials restore original values.
verification: Mutation apply/reset tests fail because helpers do not exist yet.

description: Run mutation apply/reset tests red.
steps: Execute the mutation helper test subset.
Confirm the red state points to missing helper logic.
Keep rollback semantics explicit.
verification: Pytest shows missing mutation helper implementation.

description: Implement runtime-field mutation apply and rollback helpers.
steps: Apply candidate mutations through RuntimeFieldRegistry setters.
Use snapshots or reset semantics for rollback.
Return structured trial results instead of ad hoc booleans.
verification: Mutation helper tests pass for apply and rollback paths.

description: Verify mutation helper tests green.
steps: Run the focused mutation helper suite.
Confirm mutated values revert after failed or rolled-back trials.
Check that no code-file edit path was introduced.
verification: Mutation helper suite passes.

description: Write failing tests for guarded nevergrad and textual-gradient adapters.
steps: Assert import guard behavior when optional dependencies are absent.
Assert prompt-only boundaries for textual-gradient support.
Assert bridge modules do not fail import in minimal environments.
verification: Optional dependency adapter tests fail because the guarded modules do not exist yet.

description: Implement guarded adapters for nevergrad and textual-gradient optimizers.
steps: Add nevergrad bridge module with optional import guard.
Add textual-gradient bridge module with prompt-only constraints.
Return structured availability information when dependencies are missing.
verification: Optional adapter tests pass without installing extra packages.

description: Write failing Darwin integration tests for reward-driven runtime-field optimization.
steps: Create tests/test_evolution_runtime_fields.py.
Assert Darwin can run a runtime-field trial and score it from RewardSignal.
Assert failed trials archive cleanly and can roll back.
verification: Evolution runtime-field tests fail because Darwin lacks the new bridge path.

description: Implement the narrow Phase 5 Darwin hooks for reward-driven runtime-field trials.
steps: Extend evolution.py with a minimal bridge entrypoint.
Convert RewardSignal into archive-compatible fitness using existing helpers.
Keep evidence tier and promotion state compatible with the archive.
verification: tests/test_evolution_runtime_fields.py passes.

description: Verify the focused Phase 5 suite green.
steps: Run tests/test_optimizer_bridge.py -q.
Run tests/test_evolution_runtime_fields.py -q.
Confirm no failing assertions remain in the bridge path.
verification: Phase 5 focused suites pass.

description: Run adjacent seam verification after Phase 5.
steps: Run archive, runtime_fields, evaluation_registry, and agent_runner seam tests.
Confirm the optimizer path did not bypass canonical reward or rollback behavior.
Update the handoff notes if seams changed materially.
verification: Adjacent seam regression subset passes after Phase 5 changes.

description: Write failing topology genome contract tests.
steps: Create tests/test_topology_genome.py.
Cover TopologyNode, TopologyEdge, and TopologyGenome contracts.
Assert required fields and minimal validation expectations.
verification: Topology genome contract tests fail because the module does not exist yet.

description: Run topology genome contract tests red.
steps: Execute tests/test_topology_genome.py -q.
Confirm the failure is missing contracts rather than invalid tests.
Lock the red state before implementation.
verification: Pytest shows missing topology genome module or symbols.

description: Create topology genome contract models.
steps: Add dharma_swarm/topology_genome.py.
Implement TopologyNode, TopologyEdge, and TopologyGenome.
Keep the initial surface small and serializable.
verification: Contract-level topology tests import and pass.

description: Verify the topology genome contracts green.
steps: Run the contract-focused topology tests.
Confirm JSON round-trip behavior is stable.
Do not add execution logic yet.
verification: Contract-focused topology tests pass.

description: Write failing validation tests for node uniqueness, edge endpoints, and entrypoints.
steps: Cover duplicate node IDs.
Cover edges that reference missing nodes.
Cover entrypoints that do not exist.
verification: Validation tests fail because the checks are not implemented yet.

description: Run topology validation tests red.
steps: Execute the validation subset.
Confirm the failure mode is missing validation behavior.
Keep validation independent from workflow compilation at first.
verification: Pytest shows missing validation rules.

description: Implement topology validation rules.
steps: Validate unique node IDs.
Validate edge endpoints and entrypoints.
Reject invalid genomes early with clear errors.
verification: Topology validation tests pass.

description: Verify topology validation tests green.
steps: Run the validation-focused topology suite.
Confirm failure messages remain precise.
Do not overfit to one topology shape.
verification: Validation-focused topology suite passes.

description: Write failing workflow compilation tests for topology genomes.
steps: Create tests/test_topology_execution.py.
Assert genomes compile into workflow-compatible steps.
Assert entrypoint order and dependency structure are preserved.
verification: Topology execution tests fail because compile support does not exist yet.

description: Run topology workflow compilation tests red.
steps: Execute the topology execution test file.
Confirm the red state is missing compiler behavior.
Keep compile logic separate from orchestrator acceptance at first.
verification: Pytest shows missing genome compilation behavior.

description: Implement genome-to-workflow compilation.
steps: Compile validated genomes into WorkflowDefinition-compatible steps.
Map node runtime_fields into step or agent metadata.
Preserve a simple and auditable execution graph.
verification: Topology execution tests pass for compilation and dependency ordering.

description: Verify topology workflow compilation tests green.
steps: Run the focused topology execution suite.
Check compile output is readable and deterministic.
Keep the compiler bounded to the canonical workflow runtime.
verification: Topology execution suite passes for compilation behavior.

description: Write failing provenance tests for node_id and edge_id projection into traces and lineage.
steps: Assert node and edge identifiers survive execution.
Assert lineage artifacts can be traced back to genome structure.
Assert trace metadata names the compiled topology step.
verification: Provenance metadata tests fail because node and edge IDs are not projected yet.

description: Run topology provenance tests red.
steps: Execute the provenance subset.
Confirm failure is missing metadata projection.
Keep provenance logic additive.
verification: Pytest shows missing node_id or edge_id projection behavior.

description: Implement topology provenance metadata projection.
steps: Add node_id and edge_id metadata to traces where appropriate.
Add genome metadata to lineage edges or workflow outputs.
Keep causal-credit compatibility intact.
verification: Topology provenance tests pass.

description: Write failing orchestrator tests for accepting topology genomes without breaking enum topology dispatch.
steps: Add orchestrator acceptance tests for a genome input path.
Assert existing TopologyType dispatch still works.
Assert genome-based dispatch resolves through the canonical orchestrator.
verification: Genome acceptance tests fail because orchestrator does not support the new path yet.

description: Implement orchestrator support for topology genomes while preserving enum topology behavior.
steps: Add a narrow genome-aware path in orchestrator.py.
Reuse the compiled workflow runtime rather than a second dispatcher.
Verify the enum path remains unchanged.
verification: Topology execution and orchestrator genome acceptance tests pass.

description: Run focused and adjacent seam verification after Phase 6.
steps: Run topology-focused tests.
Run workflow, traces, lineage, and orchestrator regression subsets.
Confirm topology remains easier to reason about than the workflows it encodes.
verification: Focused topology suites and adjacent seam regressions pass.

description: Write failing FrontierTask contract tests.
steps: Create tests/test_curriculum_engine.py with FrontierTask model checks.
Assert source, verifier_type, and difficulty fields exist.
Assert provenance metadata fields are preserved.
verification: Curriculum tests fail because curriculum_engine.py does not exist yet.

description: Run FrontierTask contract tests red.
steps: Execute tests/test_curriculum_engine.py -q.
Confirm the red state is missing curriculum contracts.
Do not implement heuristics before contracts exist.
verification: Pytest shows missing curriculum module or contract symbols.

description: Create curriculum_engine.py and the FrontierTask contract.
steps: Add dharma_swarm/curriculum_engine.py.
Implement FrontierTask and minimal engine shell.
Keep the engine focused on proposal generation, not execution.
verification: Curriculum contract tests pass.

description: Verify the FrontierTask contract tests green.
steps: Run the contract subset.
Confirm serialization and metadata behavior are stable.
Avoid over-designing execution semantics.
verification: FrontierTask contract subset passes.

description: Write failing derivation tests for failures, contradictions, uncertainty, and stale capabilities.
steps: Cover hard gate failures producing frontier tasks.
Cover contradiction-derived tasks.
Cover low-freshness and low-confidence derived tasks.
verification: Curriculum derivation tests fail because the heuristics are missing.

description: Run curriculum derivation tests red.
steps: Execute the derivation subset.
Confirm red state is missing heuristic behavior.
Keep derivation inputs tied to existing runtime artifacts.
verification: Pytest shows missing curriculum derivation behavior.

description: Implement curriculum derivation heuristics.
steps: Derive tasks from RewardSignal gate failures and weak final scores.
Derive tasks from unresolved contradictions and stale reports.
Compute verifier_type and difficulty heuristics.
verification: Curriculum derivation tests pass.

description: Verify curriculum derivation tests green.
steps: Run the focused derivation suite.
Confirm generated tasks preserve source provenance metadata.
Do not create shadow task IDs without seed linkage.
verification: Curriculum derivation suite passes.

description: Write failing evolution.py tests for curriculum generation hooks.
steps: Assert poor reward outcomes can emit FrontierTask proposals.
Assert the hook does not bypass archive or registry semantics.
Assert the evolution path remains optional and explicit.
verification: Evolution hook tests fail because the curriculum hook is missing.

description: Run evolution curriculum-hook tests red.
steps: Execute the evolution integration subset.
Confirm red state is missing hook behavior rather than wrong assertions.
Keep the hook narrow.
verification: Pytest shows missing curriculum hook behavior in evolution.py.

description: Implement the narrow curriculum hook inside evolution.py.
steps: Project poor or failed research outcomes into FrontierTask proposals.
Keep the hook behind an explicit path or method.
Do not create a second orchestration loop.
verification: Evolution curriculum-hook tests pass.

description: Write failing agent registry persistence tests for frontier task artifacts.
steps: Assert frontier tasks can be persisted canonically.
Assert loading does not require a second task store.
Assert provenance metadata survives the round-trip.
verification: Registry persistence tests fail because frontier persistence is missing.

description: Implement frontier task persistence in agent_registry.py and verify the focused suite green.
steps: Add a narrow JSON or JSONL persistence surface for frontier tasks.
Keep it consistent with existing agent registry patterns.
Run the focused curriculum suite after implementation.
verification: Curriculum-focused tests, including registry persistence, pass.

description: Run adjacent seam verification after Phase 7.
steps: Run curriculum-focused tests.
Run evolution, evaluation, archive, and agent_registry regression subsets.
Confirm curriculum did not create a shadow runtime.
verification: Focused and adjacent seam regression subsets pass after Phase 7.

description: Write failing installer contract tests.
steps: Create tests/test_agent_install.py.
Assert install planning and execution are separate concerns.
Assert render functions remain side-effect free.
verification: Installer contract tests fail because agent_install.py does not exist yet.

description: Run installer contract tests red.
steps: Execute tests/test_agent_install.py -q.
Confirm failure is missing installer behavior.
Do not modify render logic before the red state is captured.
verification: Pytest shows missing installer module or symbols.

description: Create agent_install.py and the installer target abstractions.
steps: Add dharma_swarm/agent_install.py.
Define installer planning and execution abstractions.
Keep install side effects explicit.
verification: Installer contract tests pass for the base abstractions.

description: Verify the base installer contracts green.
steps: Run the contract subset.
Confirm install planning is separate from execution.
Keep renderers untouched.
verification: Installer contract subset passes.

description: Write failing dry-run install planning tests for supported targets.
steps: Cover Claude Code planning.
Cover Copilot, OpenCode, Cursor, and Qwen planning.
Assert planned paths derive from explicit target rules.
verification: Dry-run planning tests fail because target planners are missing.

description: Run dry-run install planning tests red.
steps: Execute the planning subset.
Confirm failure is missing planner behavior rather than wrong assertions.
Keep destination logic explicit and deterministic.
verification: Pytest shows missing planning behavior for install targets.

description: Implement dry-run planners for the supported install targets.
steps: Map rendered artifacts to install destinations for each target.
Support Claude Code, Copilot, OpenCode, Cursor, and Qwen.
Return structured install plans without performing side effects.
verification: Dry-run planning tests pass.

description: Verify install planning tests green.
steps: Run the dry-run planning subset.
Confirm path planning remains deterministic and side-effect free.
Do not add install execution yet.
verification: Dry-run install planning suite passes.

description: Write failing install execution and checksum tests.
steps: Assert explicit install writes only through install execution paths.
Assert checksum or changed-file detection works.
Assert install manifests capture written files.
verification: Install execution tests fail because execution helpers are missing.

description: Run install execution tests red.
steps: Execute the install execution subset.
Confirm failure is missing write-path logic.
Ensure render-only tests still pass.
verification: Pytest shows missing install execution behavior.

description: Implement explicit install execution and install manifest output.
steps: Write artifacts only from install execution helpers.
Emit an install manifest summarizing writes and checksums.
Support overwrite detection without mutating render behavior.
verification: Install execution and manifest tests pass.

description: Expand render-side purity regression tests in tests/test_agent_export.py.
steps: Assert render_agent and render_all remain pure.
Assert installer logic is not imported by render paths.
Assert target expansion does not change existing artifact semantics.
verification: New export purity assertions fail before the implementation is updated.

description: Verify the focused Phase 8 suite green.
steps: Run tests/test_agent_install.py -q.
Run tests/test_agent_export.py -q.
Confirm render/install separation remains explicit.
verification: Focused Phase 8 suites pass.

description: Run adjacent seam verification after Phase 8.
steps: Run export/install-focused tests.
Run any affected archive, workflow, and agent seam tests.
Confirm no filesystem side effects leaked into render helpers.
verification: Focused and adjacent seam regression subsets pass after Phase 8.

description: Write failing offline training bridge contract tests.
steps: Create tests/test_offline_training_bridge.py.
Assert the bridge exports trajectories, grades, and rewards.
Assert no training execution entrypoint exists.
verification: Offline bridge tests fail because offline_training_bridge.py does not exist yet.

description: Run offline training bridge contract tests red.
steps: Execute tests/test_offline_training_bridge.py -q.
Confirm failure is missing export-only bridge behavior.
Do not add training hooks to make tests pass.
verification: Pytest shows missing offline export bridge behavior.

description: Create offline_training_bridge.py as an export-only bridge.
steps: Add the bridge module and manifest models.
Support exported trajectories, grades, and rewards.
Exclude any live training execution behavior.
verification: Offline bridge contract tests pass.

description: Implement export bundle manifest and artifact export path.
steps: Write bundle-manifest generation logic.
Emit referenced artifact paths or bundle members.
Keep the bridge deterministic and export-only.
verification: Offline bridge tests pass for manifest and export behavior.

description: Create the offline training lane design note and verify the focused Phase 9 suite green.
steps: Write docs/plans/2026-03-26-offline-training-lane.md.
Describe export formats and explicit non-goals.
Run the focused offline bridge suite.
verification: Offline bridge suite passes and the offline lane doc exists.

description: Verify no live-training execution path exists after Phase 9.
steps: Run the focused offline bridge tests.
Search for training execution entrypoints in the live runtime path.
Confirm Phase 9 remains export-only.
verification: Focused Phase 9 tests pass and no live-training path is introduced.

description: Create tests/fixtures/research and seed a high-quality supported report fixture.
steps: Create the fixtures directory.
Add a good-report fixture with strong citations and metadata.
Keep fixture contents stable and deterministic.
verification: Fixture path exists and can be loaded by tests.

description: Add hallucinated and contradiction-heavy research fixtures.
steps: Add a weak or fabricated-citation report fixture.
Add a contradiction-heavy report fixture.
Preserve explicit expected failure characteristics.
verification: Fixture files exist and represent distinct failure modes.

description: Add a stale recency-sensitive research fixture.
steps: Create a stale report fixture with low freshness metadata.
Mark the brief as recency-sensitive.
Keep expected failure reasons explicit.
verification: Stale-report fixture exists and encodes recency failure conditions.

description: Write failing golden tests for fixture-backed grading behavior.
steps: Load the research fixtures into grading tests.
Assert strong reports score high and weak reports fail hard gates.
Assert stale reports fail freshness when recency is required.
verification: Golden tests fail before fixture-backed grading behavior is implemented or wired.

description: Expand fixture-backed golden grading coverage.
steps: Wire the fixtures into test_auto_grade_engine.py or new golden suites.
Keep expected scores or states stable.
Verify deterministic outcomes.
verification: Fixture-backed golden grading tests pass.

description: Write failing adversarial tests for fabricated citation URLs, unsupported quantitative claims, and duplicate low-value sources.
steps: Assert fabricated citation URLs are rejected.
Assert unsupported quantitative claims trigger gate failures.
Assert duplicate low-value sourcing lowers diversity or quality.
verification: Adversarial tests fail before the grading path is hardened for those cases.

description: Expand adversarial grading checks and verify the focused suite green.
steps: Tighten grader checks only as needed to satisfy the new tests.
Preserve the canonical Section 7 evaluation function.
Run the focused grading suite.
verification: Focused grading and adversarial suites pass.

description: Run the full remaining-phase verification set and update CURRENT_STATE.md if behavior changed materially.
steps: Run all newly added phase and hardening suites.
Record pass counts and any warnings.
Update the handoff current-state file if the verification baseline changes.
verification: Remaining-phase verification passes and CURRENT_STATE.md reflects reality.
